case_title: BYRON HING VS. CALTRANS - DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF BYRON HING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALTRANS-DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MADIHA TAQI. THE COURT HAS NO RECORDS OF PROOF OF SERVICE OF CERTIFIED MAILING BEING RETURNED. DEFENDANT STATES THEY DID RECEIVING MAILING & WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HING, BYRON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALTRANS - DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2024 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT - ERIN HOLBROOK] FILED BY PLAINTIFF HING, BYRON AS TO DEFENDANT CALTRANS - DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) -MADIHA TAQI FILED BY DEFENDANT CALTRANS - DISTRICT 4 CLAIMS OFFICE
